label: Manus ownership shake-up
text: Watch for confirmation of Tencent becoming Manus' largest shareholder and details on unwinding Meta's $2B acquisition, which would reshape the AI agent startup's cap table and strategic direction.

label: OpenAI leadership transition
text: Follow reporting on who fills OpenAI's No. 2 role after the exit, as continued executive churn could affect enterprise partnerships, fundraising momentum, and product roadmap signals.

label: Anthropic infrastructure read-through
text: Watch for further data-center/compute lease announcements following the TeraWulf-Anthropic $19B deal, which validates demand for ex-bitcoin-miner power assets now pivoting to AI hosting (including the miner reportedly raising $30B for Meta).

label: Anduril contract momentum
text: Monitor additional NATO or allied defense procurement following the Lattice selection and Poland Barracuda deal, which strengthen Anduril's valuation case ahead of any future raise.

label: SambaNova capital deployment
text: Watch for how SambaNova signals use of its fresh $1B at an $11B valuation, a useful pricing benchmark for AI-chip peers competing against Nvidia's incumbency.

label: Perplexity legal disclosure
text: Track fallout from the court granting access to Perplexity founders' personal emails, a potential precedent-setter for AI copyright disputes that could pressure the startup's next funding round.
